summaries.description: Saved research summaries generated by the LLM

total_cost.description: Accumulated cost info from all LLM calls

records_stripped.description: True when relevant_records was omitted on save due to size — only IDs are stored

published.description: Published summary snapshots — a new record is created on each publish, never updated.

html.description: HTML content of the summary at publish time

summary_id.description: Reference to the parent summaries record

created_at.description: Timestamp when this version was published

index.description: Main page. Stage 1a extracts date range + selects collections. Stage 1b runs per-collection. Stage 2 generates the HTML summary.

files.description: Main page HTML — sidebar, input section, result header, tabs, and post-result action areas.
All styles including sidebar, tabs, round cards, and published versions section.
Shared mutable state object, PARAMS config, and COLLECTION_MAP/MAX_PREVIEW_RECORDS constants.
Pure utility functions: escapeHtml, sanitizeHTML, parseJSON, and delimiter extractors.
LLM prompt builder functions for all pipeline stages and record compaction helpers.
LLM provider/model discovery, tech-panel population, and per-action model-settings helpers.
LLM call wrapper (askLLM), cost accumulation, and model-option builder helpers.
Database access layer: validateDataOwner token management, executeQuery, and per-collection searchCollection loop.
All DOM rendering functions, tab switching, status/processing helpers, and sidebar rendering.
Pipeline orchestration: runPipeline, runStage2, handleResearchMore, and handleModifyPage.
All user-action handlers including send/save/delete, publish/unpublish, sidebar click, and retry.
Entry point: bindEvents, checkPermissions, and DOMContentLoaded initialisation.
Mustache pcard template for the public feed preview card.
Full-page public view using {{{html}}} to render the summary HTML.

permissions.name: read_logs
permissions.description: Read browsing history logs from hiper.cards to analyze your research

permissions.name: read_marks
permissions.description: Read bookmarks and highlights from hiper.cards to analyze your saved items

permissions.name: ai_access
permissions.description: Use your LLM API keys to analyze browsing data and generate summaries

permissions.name: publish_summary
permissions.description: Publish your research summaries publicly so anyone with the link can view them

description: Browsing History Summarizer synthesizes websites you have visited or bookmarked (in hiper cards) into nice summaries
